title: Random Fishing Crates
description: Adds a chance to fish up crates when fishing! Crates loot depends on the "Rarity" of the crate, from Common to Mythic!
body:
Each time a player catches something when fishing, they have a chance to get a Random Fishing Crate! Crates vary in rarity, from Common to Mythic, and the higher the rarity the more vaulable the loot!

Tired of having to go through tons of far away or rare structures to find an armor trim? Well, these crates can contain random trims from different structures!

For support or if you just want to join, check out our discord server! [**_Discord Link_**](https://discord.gg/XHbR7pSwdW)
